## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm test`

## Vault checklist (required)

- [ ] I reviewed if this PR changes architecture, operations, or release flow.
- [ ] If architecture changed, I updated `vault-sicsemper/03_Decisions/*` and `vault-sicsemper/01_Projects/sicsemper/status.md`.
- [ ] If deployment/rollback flow changed, I updated runbooks under `vault-sicsemper/08_Runbooks/*`.
- [ ] I kept note frontmatter contract (`id`, `title`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`, `tags`, `status`, `source`).
